flashcards.back: The layer through which users interact with the OS, including CLI, GUI, and APIs.

flashcards.front: Key functions of the OS interface
flashcards.back: Resource management, process execution, device access, and user authentication.
Windows GUI, Linux Terminal, Android Touchscreen.

flashcards.front: Role of the Shell in OS
flashcards.back: The Shell interprets user commands and communicates with the kernel.
GUI provides visual elements (icons, menus) for intuitive interaction.
